name: Catalog Pricing Service
sideDescription: A backend service built with Kotlin and Spring Boot to simulate a product catalog and pricing system.

studyTopics.title: API Rest
studyTopics.description: API Dsign, REST principles, HTTP methods, status codes, and best practices for building RESTful APIs.

studyTopics.title: Kotlin and Spring Boot
studyTopics.description: Learn Kotlin and Spring Boot for building backend services.

studyTopics.title: Redis Caching
studyTopics.description: Implement caching with Redis to improve performance and reduce latency.

studyTopics.title: Testcontainers integration
studyTopics.description: Use Testcontainers for integration testing with real dependencies like Redis and databases.

studyTopics.title: GitHub Actions CI/CD
studyTopics.description: Set up continuous integration and deployment pipelines using GitHub Actions for automated testing and deployment.
